revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月初五]][[zh:二月初五]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 5|qq=February 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * [[:en:文安|文安]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1444|en|1444|qid=Q6420|lt=1444|1=1444}} {{ill|February 23|en|February 23|qid=Q2352|lt=February 23|1=February 23}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|嘉德|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Bun'an|en|Bun'an|qid=Q1193586|lt=Bun'an|1=Bun'an}}. * [[:en:享和|享和]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}} {{ill|March 19|en|March 19|qid=Q2424|lt=March 19|1=March 19}}) – Due to the 【Yin Metal Rooster Revolution】 (辛酉), the era name was changed from {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} to {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|qid=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa|1=Kyōwa}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – A mint ({{ill|Mint (facility)|en|Mint (facility)|qid=Q464780|lt=Zōheikyoku|1=Mint (facility)}}) was established in Osaka. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1702|en|1702|qid=Q6819|lt=1702|1=1702}} {{ill|March 3|en|March 3|qid=Q2391|lt=March 3|1=March 3}}) – {{ill|Yoshimasu Higashi-dō|ja|吉益東洞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshimasu Higashi-dō|1=Yoshimasu Tōdō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q569104}}, a physician specializing in traditional Chinese medicine (died {{ill|1773|en|1773|qid=Q7692|lt=1773|1=1773}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|qid=Q7570|lt=1828|1=1828}} {{ill|March 20|en|March 20|qid=Q2427|lt=March 20|1=March 20}}) – {{ill|Takahashi Yuichi|en|Takahashi Yuichi|qid=Q3514137|lt=Takahashi Yuiichi|1=Takahashi Yuichi}}, a Western-style painter (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|qid=Q7843|lt=1894|1=1894}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|qid=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} {{ill|March 21|en|March 21|qid=Q2433|lt=March 21|1=March 21}}) – {{ill|Terauchi Masatake|en|Terauchi Masatake|qid=Q315559|lt=Jerin Masatake|1=Terauchi Masatake}}, a political leader, 18th Prime Minister and an army general (died {{ill|1919|en|1919|qid=Q2157|lt=1919|1=1919}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} {{ill|March 3|en|March 3|qid=Q2391|lt=March 3|1=March 3}}) – {{ill|Fukuoka Takachika|en|Fukuoka Takachika|qid=Q3090706|lt=Fukuoka Kōtei|1=Fukuoka Takachika}}, a politician (died {{ill|1919|en|1919|qid=Q2157|lt=1919|1=1919}}). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1846|en|1846|qid=Q7640|lt=1846|1=1846}} {{ill|March 2|en|March 2|qid=Q2390|lt=March 2|1=March 2}}) – {{ill|Kobayashi Yasushi|ja|小林やす|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobayashi Yasushi|1=Yasu Kobayashi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11461304}}, known as "Japan's oldest man" (died {{ill|1964|en|1964|qid=Q2652|lt=1964|1=1964}}); note: an unofficial record by Guinness. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|March 21|en|March 21|qid=Q2433|lt=March 21|1=March 21}}) – {{ill|Wakatsuki Reijirō|en|Wakatsuki Reijirō|qid=Q335177|lt=Wakatsuki Reijirō|1=Wakatsuki Reijirō}}, who served as Prime Minister in both the 25th and 28th administrations (died {{ill|1949|en|1949|qid=Q5188|lt=1949|1=1949}}). == Deaths == * [[麟徳]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|664|en|664|qid=Q30621|lt=664|1=664}} {{ill|March 7|en|March 7|qid=Q2394|lt=March 7|1=March 7}}) – {{ill|Xuanzang Sanzo|ja|玄奘三蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xuanzang Sanzo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 玄奘|1=Xuanzang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q42063}}, a prominent monk from the Tang dynasty (born {{ill|600|en|600|qid=Q25586|lt=600|1=600}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|4|2|6|1|5|3|2|0205|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 5일]] [[ja:2月5日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月初五]]
[[ar:February 5 (Lunisolar)]]
